title: slugify
goal: Create src/slugify.mjs exporting function slugify(s): lowercase, trim, replace each run of non-alphanumeric characters with a single "-", and strip leading/trailing "-".
notes: Golden must stress: leading/trailing spaces, runs of punctuation collapsing to one "-", mixed case, and a string that is all punctuation -> "". Visible can test "Hello World" -> "hello-world".
